prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程等理科热门专业社会热度持续偏高，临床医学、口腔医学等医学类专业热度稳定，土木建筑类热度分化观望。青海省2026年高考 总人数约48000人（含不确定标记），按近年理科/物理类占比约63%估算，物理类考生约30240–30720人，与2025年30457人基本持平，考生规模无明显变化；吉林大学位于吉林省长春市，距青海省较远，属于跨省就读；该校在青海省招生计划占比较小（2025年物理类52人），地域偏好因素影响有限。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次3641名、2026年大幅扩招17.3%带来的竞争加剧效应、学校声誉负面事件对报考热度的潜在降温作用、以及考生总数基本持平等因素，预 计2026年理科（物理类）最低录取位次将。扩招使位次后移压力增大，但声誉负面事件可能抑制部分考生报考意愿，两者对冲后预测位次约3989 名，区间3489–4489名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum admission rankings for Jilin University in Qinghai Province for Science (Physics Category) were approximately 1684 → 3544 → 2272 → 2695 → 3641, showing an overall fluctuating and backward trend. The ranking was best in 2021 (1684), significantly dropped to 3544 in 2022, rebounded to 2272 in 2023, and then continued to decline over the next two years, reaching 3641 in 2025, with a cumulative backward shift of about 1369 positions in the last three years, indicating an overall increase in competition intensity. The enrollment plan for Science (Physics Category) in Qinghai Province was 47 in 2021, 57 in 2022, 48 in 2023, 50 in 2024, and 52 in 2025. In 2026, the plan expands to 61, an increase of 9 students compared to 2025, with an expansion rate of about 17.3%, the largest increase in recent years. Expansion will increase supply, exerting downward pressure on rankings.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Jilin University is a national key university directly under the Ministry of Education, a member of the 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class construction universities. In the Soft Science China University Rankings, it ranked 24th in 2021, 27th in 2022, 27th in 2023, 26th in 2024, 26th in 2025, and 26th in 2026, consistently in the top 30 nationally with strong comprehensive strength. In 2026, its reputation evaluation is 'significantly negative,' mainly involving campus safety incidents (theft incident in the Qianwei campus bathhouse), which has attracted public attention. Its Douyin popularity ranking is 40th, with a 'relatively hot' evaluation and a certain amount of short video exposure. In 2025, abnormal filing signals showed fluctuations in Jilin University's admission scores in provinces such as Jiangsu and Heilongjiang, which may have a certain impact on candidates' application psychology. Jilin University has 2 A+ disciplines (Archaeology, Marxist Theory), 5 A disciplines (Law, Chemistry, Mathematics, Physics, Mechanical Engineering, etc.), and 8 A- disciplines (Philosophy, Business Administration, Political Science, Materials Science and Engineering, Biology, Electronic Science and Technology, Computer Science and Technology, etc.), with a total of 15 A- and above, covering a wide range of disciplines with balanced strength.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Popular science majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering continue to have high social demand, while medical majors like Clinical Medicine and Stomatology maintain stable popularity, and Civil Engineering and Architecture majors face divided and wait-and-see attitudes. In 2026, the total number of college entrance exam takers in Qinghai Province is about 48,000 (including uncertain markers). Based on the recent proportion of Science/Physics Category candidates at about 63%, the number of Physics Category candidates is estimated to be between 30,240 and 30,720, roughly the same as the 30,457 in 2025, with no significant change in candidate scale. Jilin University is located in Changchun, Jilin Province, far from Qinghai Province, making it an out-of-province study option. The university's enrollment plan in Qinghai Province accounts for a small proportion (52 in Physics Category in 2025), so regional preference factors have limited impact.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 3641, the significant 17.3% enrollment expansion in 2026 intensifying competition, the potential cooling effect of negative reputation incidents on application enthusiasm, and the basically unchanged total number of candidates, it is predicted that the minimum admission ranking for Science (Physics Category) in 2026 will be approximately 3989, with a range of 3489–4489. The expansion increases downward pressure on rankings, but negative reputation incidents may suppress some candidates' willingness to apply, and the two factors offset each other.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: The predicted ranking is approximately 3989, with a range of 3489–4489. Candidates with rankings within the lower limit of the range (3489) can focus on sprinting for Tier 1 majors (Clinical Medicine, Computer Science, Vehicle Engineering, etc.). Candidates with rankings in the middle of the range (approximately 3800–4200) should mainly target Tier 2 majors while also attempting Tier 1 majors. Candidates with rankings near the upper limit of the range (4489) should primarily use Tier 3 majors as a safety net while striving for Tier 2 majors. Jilin University has a wide range of disciplines, so it is recommended to choose based on personal interests and discipline evaluation levels.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum admission rankings for Jilin University in Qinghai Province's liberal arts (history category) were approximately 439th → 629th → 323rd → 410th → 589th, with significant fluctuations. In 2021, the ranking was 439th; in 2022, it dropped sharply to 629th; in 2023, it surged forward to 323rd (the best in recent years); in 2024, it fell back to 410th; and in 2025, it dropped again to 589th, showing an oscillating trend with no clear single direction. The enrollment plan for Jilin University in Qinghai Province's liberal arts (history category) was 18 students in 2021, 13 in 2022, 12 in 2023, 13 in 2024, and 12 in 2025. In 2026, the plan is reduced to 10 students, a decrease of 2 students from 2025, representing a reduction of approximately 16.7%, the lowest planned number in recent years. The reduction in enrollment will decrease supply, exerting upward pressure on rankings.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Jilin University is a national key university directly under the Ministry of Education, a member of the 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class construction universities. In the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, it ranks 26th, consistently within the top 30 nationally, with strong comprehensive strength, attracting liberal arts students. In 2026, its reputation evaluation is 'clearly negative,' mainly due to campus security incidents (theft incident at the Qianwei Campus bathhouse), which has drawn public attention. Its Douyin popularity ranks 40th, rated as 'relatively hot.' Abnormal signals in 2025 admissions show fluctuations in admission lines in provinces such as Jiangsu and Heilongjiang, which may affect candidates' application psychology. Jilin University has outstanding advantages in liberal arts: Marxist Theory A+, Law A, Philosophy A-, Political Science A-, Archaeology A+, etc., with strong humanities and social sciences strength, attracting liberal arts students.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Law major is socially popular (recommended), Chinese Language and Literature/Chinese major is popular (recommended), and Journalism and Communication category is clearly discouraged. In 2026, the total number of Gaokao candidates in Qinghai Province is approximately 48,000 (including uncertain markers). Based on the recent proportion of liberal arts/history category at about 36%, the number of history category candidates is approximately 17,280, roughly the same as 17,212 in 2025. Jilin University is located in Changchun City, Jilin Province, far from Qinghai Province, requiring cross-province study. The university's liberal arts enrollment plan in Qinghai Province is small (only 10 students in 2026), so regional preference factors have limited impact.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 589th, the competition relief effect from the 16.7% enrollment reduction in 2026 (ranking forward), the potential cooling effect on application enthusiasm from negative reputation incidents (ranking backward), and the roughly stable total number of candidates, the predicted minimum admission ranking for liberal arts (history category) in 2026 is approximately 550th, with a range of 471st to 629th. The enrollment reduction pushes the ranking forward, but negative reputation incidents may suppress some candidates' willingness to apply. After offsetting these factors, the predicted ranking is about 550th, with a range of 471st to 629th.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: The predicted ranking is approximately 550th, with a range of 471st to 629th. Candidates with rankings within the lower limit of the range (471st or better) can focus on sprinting for Tier 1 majors (Law, Political Science and Administration); candidates with rankings in the middle of the range (approximately 500th to 580th) should target Tier 2 majors as their main direction (Ideological and Political Education, Chinese Language and Literature); candidates with rankings near the upper limit of the range (629th) should primarily use Tier 3 majors as safety options. Jilin University's Law is an A-level discipline, and Marxist Theory is an A+ discipline, with outstanding liberal arts strength. It is recommended to prioritize advantageous disciplines based on personal interests.
